word: G163 - αἰχμαλωτίζω - aichmalōtízō - aheekh-mal-o-tid'-zo - Lead away captive

sections.paragraph:
- Original: αἰχμαλωτίζω

- Transliteration: Aichmalotizo

- Phonetic: aheekh-mal-o-tid'-zo

- Definition:

1. to lead away captive

2. metaph. to capture ones mind, captivate

- Origin: from G164

- TDNT entry: 04:15,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G164; to make captive: - lead away captive bring into captivity.
